CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Continued To Feb-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Bank Of America, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.'s unopposed Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement is GRANTED IN SUBSTANTIAL PART.

Good cause appearing and pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, the court orders the dismissal be vacated and judgment be entered. The court will include costs in the judgment, but less than requested. The payments under the agreement included costs to date and the parties provided that any judgment entered upon default on payment could include "motion and/or order fees required by the court." Such fees are not $530, but $60. Service was accomplished in-house by mail, so the court will not award $67 for service of process.

The court will enter judgment for $563, including $503 in principal sum and $60 in costs.

To the extent Plaintiff seeks different of additional relief, the motion is denied.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the above text and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed judgment consistent with the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order or proposed judgment received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Moving party to prepare a proposed order and proposed judgment which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
